summary: Fixed garbled fonts on /luxe: Vietnamese text was mojibake because earlier PowerShell Out-File extraction mis-encoded UTF-8. Re-extracted luxe/page.tsx via cmd redirection preserving UTF-8; verified no mojibake, no lint errors; Next.js recompiled /luxe successfully.
current_status: /luxe renders correct Vietnamese. Frontend on 3000, backend on 8096. User should hard-refresh browser (Ctrl+F5).
